description:
Graduated as the first in my cohort within just 3.3 years, achieving the milestone of publishing two international journal papers and excelling in various national-level competitions across multiple fields.
• Led the PKM-K 2024 Team: Guided the team to PIMNAS at UNAIR, securing over $625 in funding from Kemristekdikti’s Program Kreativitas Mahasiswa to drive project development and implementation.
• Teaching Assistant for Computer Networks: Supported lectures, mentored 70+ students, and handled grading, ensuring academic standards and effective learning strategies.
• Research and Community Service Collaborator: Contributed as a student member in faculty-led research and community service projects under PDWM and PDWA programs.
• Wirausaha Merdeka Participant: Gained entrepreneurial skills through hands-on activities beyond the classroom, fostering innovation and practical business expertise.

school: Bangkit Academy 2023 By Google, GoTo, Traveloka
description:
• Completed the Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate, gaining practical skills in data cleaning, analysis, and visualization, as well as mastering tools such as Google Spreadsheet, SQL, R, and Tableau.
• Completed the Mathematics for Machine Learning and Data Science Specialization, understanding the mathematical foundations for machine learning and statistics to comprehensively enhance data analysis capabilities.
• Completed the Machine Learning Specialization, mastering the development and implementation of machine learning models, including supervised and unsupervised learning, decision trees, and neural networks.
• Led the development of "PlantWise: Your Plant's Best Friend", a capstone project for Bangkit Academy. The project achieved a 99% accuracy rate in plant recommendation testing. PlantWise also integrated cloud-based agricultural updates, enabling farmers to stay informed and make well-informed decisions.
